title: Minecraft but only 1 Slot
description: Try and beat minecraft with only one inventory slot.
body:
Created originally for Youtuber Fantst. (Will update this when the video comes out)

This is a challenge mod, beat Minecraft with only 1 inventory slot. ![Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f19c1fe21af47e81303c3969806578b872780fdb.png)
